name: CM_PICKER_VERTICAL1ST
description: Infinite scroll vertical picker with 3 visible items (TOP, MID, LOW positions). Shows title, main text, and value for selected item. Value fades out/in (100ms/167ms) on selection change. Title visibility toggles based on selection (always visible at index 0 or if titleShowAlways=true). Supports enabled/disabled states.
visualForm: Optional title area → 3-item vertical picker stack with centered selection → fade-in/out value display → gradient mask overlay
descriptionKo: 3개 항목(TOP/MID/LOW 위치)이 보이는 무한 스크롤 세로 피커입니다. 선택 변경 시 값이 100ms/167ms 페이드 인/아웃되며, titleShowAlways 옵션으로 타이틀 표시를 제어합니다.
descriptionEn: Infinite scroll vertical picker with 3 visible items (TOP, MID, LOW positions). Shows title, main text, and value for selected item. Value fades out/in (100ms/167ms) on selection change. Title visibility toggles based on selection (always visible at index 0 or if titleShowAlways=true). Supports enabled/disabled states.
